title: Cyclist hit and killed at roadworks on N2
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS -  George Police are investigating culpable homicide following an accident that claimed the life of a 62-year-old man on his bicycle.

The man was knocked down by a truck on the N2 near Eden Church this morning, Friday 5 July.


> According to provincial police spokesperson Lieutenant Colonel Malcolm Pojie, the circumstances surrounding the incident are part of ongoing investigation.


"Preliminary information suggests that man was hit by a truck travelling the same direction towards Wilderness. The rider succumbed to the serious injuries sustained," said Pojie.

The driver of the truck was unharmed.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
